name: ciphersins
description: Static scanner for JWT, timing, and weak crypto footguns in Node/TS app code.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ciphersins/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @ciphersins/core build && pnpm --filter ciphersins typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm format && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm install && pnpm test && pnpm smoke:cli
